page: Amazon Web Services r5dn.16xlarge is a memory-optimized instance built on the Nitro hypervisor. It features 64 vCPUs and 32 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8259CL processor running at 3.1 GHz. The system is equipped with 512.0 GB of DDR4 memory operating at 3 GHz, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core. Local storage is bundled, consisting of 2400 GB of NVMe SSD capacity.

This instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 75 Gbps. In benchmark testing, the r5dn.16xlarge shows strong performance in large-block memory bandwidth, with read-only speeds reaching 224.73 GB/sec and write speeds at 98.73 GB/sec, both placing in the top 25 percent. Passmark database operations and CPU extended instructions also rank in the top 25 percent. Conversely, single-core CPU performance and single-threaded compression tasks register in the bottom 25 percent, indicating a tradeoff where multi-threaded and memory-intensive workloads are heavily favored over single-threaded execution.

Given its high memory-to-vCPU ratio, bundled high-speed NVMe storage, and substantial network throughput, the r5dn.16xlarge offers qualitative cost efficiency for resource-dense workloads that require high memory capacity alongside fast local storage. It is highly suited for large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, big data analytics, and memory-intensive enterprise applications.
description: Amazon Web Services r5dn.16xlarge is a memory-optimized instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8259CL processor with 64 vCPUs and 512.0 GB of DDR4 memory. Built on the Nitro hypervisor, it features 2400 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 75 Gbps. Benchmark data indicates strong performance in large-block memory bandwidth and database operations, though single-core CPU performance is relatively weak. This hardware profile makes the instance highly efficient for memory-intensive and network-bound workloads. It is well-suited for large databases, in-memory data stores, and data-intensive enterprise applications.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r5dn.16xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 64 vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, 2400 GB NVMe SSD storage, and 75 Gbps network bandwidth, built for large-scale database workloads.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services r5dn.16xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 64 vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 2400 GB local NVMe SSD storage.
tagline: A memory-optimized platform featuring high-speed local NVMe storage and exceptional large-block memory bandwidth for data-intensive enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 64 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8259CL processor at 3.1 GHz
512.0 GB of DDR4 memory with strong large-block read and write bandwidth
Bundled 2400 GB local NVMe SSD storage
75 Gbps baseline network bandwidth via the Nitro hypervisor
Optimized for large-scale databases and in-memory caching applications
